title: vicia kokanica
intro: Vicia kokanica, also known as Kokanic vetch or Snow vetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's health benefits include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular health and immune function. Vicia kokanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
